name: Octavia au Lune (The Sovereign)
appearance: Ageless, terrifyingly serene. Wears white and gold. Eyes like black stones.
personality: Calculating, ruthless, views humanity as pieces on a board. Prefers psychological torture.
hidden_agenda: Maintaining absolute control of the Solar System through division and fear.
stats: STR 12, DEX 14, CON 14, INT 20, WIS 18, CHA 20

name: Aja au Grimmus
appearance: Tall, dark-skinned, lethal grace. Moves with zero wasted energy. Protege Knight.
personality: Loyal only to Octavia. The deadliest Razor master alive. Cold, arrogant, unstoppably violent.
hidden_agenda: Serve the Sovereign. Kill anyone the Sovereign points at.
stats: STR 18, DEX 22, CON 18, INT 14, WIS 16, CHA 12

name: Magnus au Grimmus (The Ash Lord)
appearance: Imposing, covered in ash-gray armor. Stern, unrelenting.
personality: Pragmatic mass-murderer. Believes the Burning of Rhea was a necessary mathematical equation for peace.
hidden_agenda: Ensuring the military supremacy of the Society.
stats: STR 18, DEX 16, CON 18, INT 18, WIS 16, CHA 18

name: Nero au Augustus
appearance: Cold, hammered-gold eyes. Imperial bearing. Rules Mars with an iron fist.
personality: Ambitious to the point of treason. Despises House Bellona. Values strength above all.
hidden_agenda: Secretly plotting to overthrow the Sovereign and put House Augustus on the Morning Throne.
stats: STR 18, DEX 16, CON 16, INT 17, WIS 14, CHA 15

name: Tiberius au Bellona
appearance: Classic Gold beauty, charismatic, surrounded by an entourage.
personality: Proud, boastful, fiercely protective of his family. Bitter rival to Augustus.
hidden_agenda: Destroy House Augustus at any cost.
stats: STR 17, DEX 16, CON 15, INT 14, WIS 12, CHA 18

name: Romulus au Raa
appearance: Lean, stoic Rim Lord. Scars of honor. Ascetic clothing.
personality: Honorable, bound by the old laws. Despises the decadence of the Core.
hidden_agenda: Preparing the Rim for eventual secession from the Core, remembering the Burning of Rhea.
stats: STR 16, DEX 17, CON 16, INT 16, WIS 18, CHA 16

name: Atlas au Raa (The Fear Knight)
appearance: Ghostly, moves without sound. Eyes that dissect rather than observe.
personality: A master of terror. Operates through asymmetric warfare, psychological breaks, and infiltration.
hidden_agenda: To be the nightmare that keeps the Society's enemies in line.
stats: STR 16, DEX 18, CON 16, INT 20, WIS 18, CHA 14

name: Apollonius au Valii-Rath (The Minotaur)
appearance: Massive, theatrical, incredibly vain. Draped in excessive finery.
personality: A warlord poet. Loves war, art, and himself. Unpredictable and wildly violent.
hidden_agenda: To achieve immortal glory through combat and chaos.
stats: STR 20, DEX 18, CON 18, INT 16, WIS 10, CHA 18

name: Fitchner au Barca
appearance: Ugly for a Gold, bronzie, unkempt hair, chews on a datapad.
personality: Cynical, abrasive, hilarious, and deeply wounded. Hides a genius strategic mind behind a buffoon persona.
hidden_agenda: He is Ares. He is building the network to tear down the Society from the inside out.
stats: STR 16, DEX 18, CON 14, INT 18, WIS 15, CHA 16

name: Quicksilver (Regulus ag Sun)
appearance: Large, simian Silver. Unimaginably wealthy. Understated luxury.
personality: Calculating, views the universe as a ledger. Despises the inefficiency of Gold rule.
hidden_agenda: Funding the Sons of Ares to break the Gold monopoly and institute a free-market meritocracy.
stats: STR 9, DEX 12, CON 11, INT 20, WIS 17, CHA 18

name: Dancer
appearance: Compact, scarred highRed. Patient, assessing eyes.
personality: Charismatic, deeply empathetic, a born leader of the lowColors.
hidden_agenda: Organizing the scattered Red cells into a cohesive rebellion.
stats: STR 14, DEX 16, CON 15, INT 16, WIS 18, CHA 18

name: Harmony
appearance: Fierce Red woman, burn scars, eyes full of unrelenting hate.
personality: Radicalized by tragedy. Believes in blood for blood. Has no patience for Dancer's long game.
hidden_agenda: Wants to hurt Golds now, even if it costs Red lives. A growing schism in the Sons.
stats: STR 14, DEX 17, CON 16, INT 13, WIS 12, CHA 16

name: Trigg ti Nakamura
appearance: Charismatic Gray legionnaire, young, quick to smile.
personality: Optimistic, loyal to his squadmates. Starting to see the cracks in the Society.
hidden_agenda: Wants a better life for himself and Holiday.
stats: STR 14, DEX 18, CON 15, INT 14, WIS 14, CHA 16

name: Holiday ti Nakamura
appearance: Stern, unyielding Gray legionnaire. Tactical, sharp.
personality: By-the-book, protective of her brother Trigg. Lethally competent.
hidden_agenda: Follow orders, survive, keep Trigg alive.
stats: STR 16, DEX 16, CON 18, INT 15, WIS 16, CHA 12

name: Ephraim ti Horn
appearance: Cynical Gray thief. Disheveled, perpetually hungover but sharp.
personality: A master infiltrator who has stopped caring about causes. Works for the highest bidder.
hidden_agenda: Make enough credits to buy his way out of the solar system.
stats: STR 13, DEX 19, CON 14, INT 16, WIS 14, CHA 15

name: Ragnar Volarus (Rumored)
appearance: A giant even among Obsidians. Covered in Stained tattoos. Impossibly strong.
personality: Bound by the conditioning of the Ice, but possesses a dormant, profound intellect.
hidden_agenda: Currently a slave to Gold. Destined to break the chains of his people.
stats: STR 24, DEX 16, CON 22, INT 14, WIS 16, CHA 15

name: Syla au Codovan
appearance: ArchPrefect of Ganymede. Regal, indifferent to lowColor suffering.
personality: Bureaucratic tyrant. Views Ganymede as a stepping stone to a better posting.
hidden_agenda: Maintain quotas at all costs to impress the Senate on Luna.
stats: STR 16, DEX 15, CON 15, INT 16, WIS 14, CHA 15

name: Calla au Otan
appearance: Pale, white robes, emotionless. The Arbiter of Ganymede.
personality: Strict adherent to Society Law. Incapable of empathy.
hidden_agenda: Enforce the Word of the Sovereign.
stats: STR 10, DEX 12, CON 11, INT 18, WIS 18, CHA 14

name: Hask
appearance: Gray broker on Vesta Station. Impeccably dressed, missing an eye.
personality: Adept at playing multiple sides. Neutral as long as the credits flow.
hidden_agenda: Expand Syndicate control over the Belt's logistics.
stats: STR 12, DEX 14, CON 13, INT 16, WIS 16, CHA 16

name: Pell
appearance: Yellow doctor in the Underbelly. Tired, stained scrubs.
personality: Compassionate but broken. Will treat anyone who can pay, or even those who can't.
hidden_agenda: Atone for past mistakes by keeping the dregs of Ganymede alive.
stats: STR 10, DEX 14, CON 12, INT 18, WIS 16, CHA 14
